/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/tg-weather_bot.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tg-weather_bot.dir/weatherapi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tg-weather_bot.dir/curleasy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tg-weather_bot.dir/postgresclient.cpp.o -o tg-weather_bot  /usr/local/lib/libTgBot.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpq.so
